model_tasks: assembler ag places an order with the supplier
assembler ag sends the order to the supplier and the supplier processes the order
the supplier sends an invoice to assembler ag

model: the supplier sends an invoice to assembler ag
assembler ag places an order with the supplier
assembler ag sends the order to the supplier and the supplier processes the order

user_text: The process begins with Assembler AG deciding to place an order with the supplier. Once the decision is made, Assembler AG proceeds to send the order to the supplier. After receiving the order, the supplier takes the necessary steps to process it. Following the processing of the order, the supplier prepares and sends an invoice to Assembler AG. Upon receiving the invoice from the supplier, Assembler AG acknowledges it, marking the end of the process.
output_text: The process begins with Assembler AG placing an order with the supplier. Once the order is placed, Assembler AG sends the order to the supplier. The supplier then processes the order. After processing the order, the supplier sends an invoice to Assembler AG. The process continues with Assembler AG receiving the invoice. This marks the end of the process.
